utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Hey , Joey , could you pass the cheese ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Listen uh , I would prefer it if you did not call me Joey .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Since I do not know anyone here , I thought it might be fun to try out a cool work nickname .

utterances.speaker: A Waiter
utterances.text: Hey , dragon ! Here is your tips from Monday and Tuesday .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: There is like ... there is like 300 bucks in this one !

emotion_cause.span: 5_There is like ... there is like 300 bucks in this one !

utterances.speaker: The Waiter
utterances.text: Yeah , people get pretty generous around the holidays . And it never hurts to wear tight trousers .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Could the waiters gather around to hear tonight specials ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Okay , first there is a Chilean Sea Bass prepared with a Mango relish on a bag ... Why is nobody writing these down ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Because your all gonna make up fake specials and make me cook them like you did the other night ?

emotion_cause.span: 10_your all gonna make up fake specials and make me cook them like you did the other night ?
